options.name: --api-key
options.description:
The key used to authenticate with the web
server.

options.name: --encryption-key
options.description:
The key used to encrypt the packages before
uploading.

options.name: --installation-status-timeout
options.description:
The number of seconds to ignore 404 errors when checking
installation status.

options.name: --legacy-api
options.description:
Whether to use the PolyDeploy API instead of the
BulkInstall API.

options.name: --packages-directory
options.description:
Defines the directory that contains the install
packages.

options.name: --recurse
options.description:
Whether to search the packages directory
recursively.

options.name: --target-uri
options.description:
The URL of the site to which the packages will be
deployed.
